name: Creamy Italian Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Refrigerate the dressing until ready to use.
3. Shake well before serving.
Makes 1/3 cup = 6 servings.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 FAT EXCHANGE; CAL: 46; CHO: 0mg; CAR: 1g; PRO: 0g; FAT: 5g.
Source: Light & Easy Diabetes Cuisine by Betty Marks.
Brought to you and yours via Nancy O'Brion and her Meal-Master.
